summary: Awwwards-level upgrade tested end-to-end. Backend 9/9 pytest tests pass (no regressions on /api/projects, /api/services, /api/contact POST/GET 201 + 422 validation, /api/status). Frontend: Preloader observed at fresh load (data-testid=preloader) with 0->100 counter and slide-up exit, scroll lock released after (documentElement.overflow='visible'). Hero shows 'Engenharia inteligente.' (testids hero-title + hero-tagline). Clients section + 6 client items, Manifesto + manifesto-text, Work desktop horizontal (420vh) + work-cta-end, Work mobile fallback shown <1024px (work-section-mobile visible, work-section hidden), Process + 4 steps, Services + 6 cards, Founder + quote/portrait/title, Stats, BigCTA with 'Vamos conversar?' + bigcta-primary, Footer with 2026 + social icons. Anchor nav (Lenis) scrolls smoothly to Fundador (0->25393). Contact form POST returns 201, success banner 'Mensagem registrada com sucesso' visible, form fields reset. 0 console errors, 0 page errors across desktop and mobile runs.
critical_code_review_comments: Preloader.jsx locks document.documentElement.style.overflow='hidden' for ~3.5s. The cleanup is good (resets to '' on done/unmount), but if the component unmounts mid-animation an unrelated overflow value previously set elsewhere would be wiped. Currently fine since no other code touches it.
Carry-over from iteration 2: GET /api/contact remains public and returns full submissions including emails -- restrict before production.
Carry-over: contact form testids use prefix 'contact-input-*' (not 'contact-name' as suggested in PRD) -- consider unifying.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed contact records via pytest + 1 via Playwright UI flow (TEST UI {ts}). Visible in MongoDB 'contacts' collection with TEST_/TEST UI prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression file: /app/backend/tests/test_api.py (9 tests). Preloader runs ~3.5s on fresh load and locks scroll; for Playwright use wait_until='commit' to catch it, or wait 4-5s after navigation. Work desktop is 420vh sticky-horizontal (do not assert all cards visible at once -- scroll through). Work mobile fallback (data-testid=work-section-mobile) activates <1024px. Contact form testids: contact-input-name|email|company|message + contact-submit. Anchor nav uses Lenis (smooth) -- wait 1500ms after click before asserting scroll position. Marquee component is removed; ticker now lives inside BigCTA.
